execution_environment.execution_rule: After you form a plan for the analysis, execute that plan in Galaxy.

user_prompt: I have a single-cell RNA-seq dataset in Matrix Market format with barcode and gene files. I want a Galaxy analysis that identifies cell clusters using the Louvain algorithm and provides UMAP and marker-gene visualizations. Please choose an appropriate Galaxy workflow or training material, run it, and report the normalization tool, the total number of workflow tool steps, and the genes shown in the dotplot of top genes on clusters.
